name: Peoples Bank
description_short: Sheridan residents access banking at Peoples Bank, 1120 S Rock St in AR.
description_long:
Peoples Bank operates a branch at 1120 S Rock St in downtown Sheridan, AR, serving as a primary banking destination for the local community. This standalone branch location is conveniently situated for Sheridan residents and business owners who need in-person banking services. Specific branch hours are not listed online, so visitors should contact the branch directly to confirm current operating times.

The Sheridan branch of Peoples Bank provides standard banking services including account management, deposits, withdrawals, and financial consultations. Customers can discuss their banking needs with local staff at the 1120 S Rock St location during regular business hours. Services available include personal and business checking and savings accounts for community members.

For Sheridan, AR residents seeking local banking services, this Peoples Bank branch at 1120 S Rock St offers convenient access to everyday financial solutions. When visiting, bring a valid government-issued ID and account information for any account-related transactions. Local customers appreciate the personal service and community focus this branch brings to Sheridan.
services: Online banking and mobile banking app
Lost or stolen card replacement and protection
pros: Emphasizes local decision-making and community presence rather than centralized corporate processing
Offers comprehensive personal banking including checking, savings, money market accounts, and mortgages
Provides dedicated business banking with tailored commercial lending and treasury management services
Includes modern digital banking tools like mobile app, online banking, and mobile check deposit
Highlights personalized customer service with local branch support and relationship-focused approach
Offers free online bill pay and financial calculators for customer planning
Provides lost/stolen card protection with rapid replacement service
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Sheridan, Benton, and East End areas only
Website lacks specific information on interest rates, APRs, fees, or detailed product terms
No transparent comparison of products against competitors or explanation of pricing structure
Limited online information about credit card rewards programs or specific features
No mention of FDIC insurance limits, security certifications, or regulatory oversight details
best_for: Local residents and business owners in Sheridan, Benton, and East End seeking relationship-based banking
Small to medium-sized businesses wanting personalized commercial lending and local decision-making
Customers who value in-person service and knowing their banker personally over digital-only banking
diagnosis: Peoples Bank is best suited for customers in its service areas (Sheridan, Benton, East End) who prioritize relationship-based banking and value local decision-making over the convenience of national branch networks. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—this bank only serves specific local areas and is not accessible to customers outside its footprint.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Sheridan, AR banking: Peoples Bank at 1120 S Rock St offers community banking services and account management.
